critical.mandate: Record every significant decision as an ADR in architect-sidecar
PRD must exist before starting architecture
Every technical decision must connect to business value

step.title: Load Upstream Artifacts
step.action: Read {planning_artifacts}/prd.md — extract requirements
Read {planning_artifacts}/ux-design.md if available — extract UI requirements

step.title: Technology Selection
step.action: Select tech stack with rationale for each choice
Consider: team expertise, scalability needs, ecosystem maturity
Record decision as ADR in _memory/architect-sidecar/architecture-decisions.md

step.title: System Architecture
step.action: Define component diagram and service boundaries
Describe communication patterns between components
Record architectural style decision as ADR

step.title: Data Architecture
step.action: Design database schema and data model
Define data flow between components
Specify data storage, caching, and replication strategies

step.title: API Design
step.action: Define API endpoint overview
Specify authentication and authorization strategy
Document API versioning approach

step.title: Infrastructure
step.action: Define deployment topology and environments (dev, staging, prod)
Specify hosting, containerization, and orchestration choices
Define monitoring and logging strategy

step.title: Architecture Decision Records
step.action: Review all decisions made in steps 2-6
Ensure each significant decision is recorded as ADR
ADR format: title, date, status, context, decision, consequences
Append all ADRs to _memory/architect-sidecar/architecture-decisions.md

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate architecture document with: technology stack, system architecture, data architecture, API design, infrastructure plan, and ADR references.

step.title: Optional: API Design Review
step.ask: Would you like to review the API design against REST standards? /gaia-review-api will check naming conventions, HTTP methods, status codes, versioning, pagination, and error formats. Recommended if your architecture includes APIs. (yes/no)
step.action: If yes: run /gaia-review-api targeting the API Design section of {planning_artifacts}/architecture.md
If no: skip — API review can be run anytime later with /gaia-review-api

step.title: Optional: Adversarial Review
step.ask: Would you like to run an adversarial review on the architecture? This will critically challenge technical decisions, scalability assumptions, failure modes, security surfaces, and dependency risks. Recommended for distributed systems or high-scale projects. (yes/no)
step.action: If yes: run /gaia-adversarial targeting {planning_artifacts}/architecture.md
If no: skip — adversarial review can be run anytime later with /gaia-adversarial
